app.name: Pymss Studio
app.tagline: Professional AI-powered audio source separation workstation

home.title: Pymss Studio Workspace
home.subtitle: An integrated workspace for runtime diagnostics, model management, and audio separation tasks.
home.dropHint: Choose audio files or folders to create a separation task.
home.quickStartDesc: Quickly access separation setup, model management, and task monitoring.
home.actionSeparateHint: Choose input audio, model, and output parameters.
home.actionModelsHint: Browse, download, and maintain local models.
home.actionTasksHint: Monitor task progress, execution logs, and status.
home.modelHint: Only downloaded and available models are shown on the separation page.

separate.title: Separation Task Setup
separate.subtitle: Configure input source, model, output directory, and runtime parameters before starting a task.
separate.inputPlaceholder: Choose an audio file or input folder
separate.separateTaskOutputDirHint: When enabled, each task writes to a task ID subfolder. When disabled, files are written directly into the selected directory and may overwrite matching names.
separate.audioQualityHint: These parameters apply to the current separation task and will be saved as future defaults.

inference.deviceIdsPlaceholder: Separate multiple IDs with commas, for example 0,1

tasks.title: Task Queue
tasks.subtitle: Monitor separation task progress, execution logs, and history.
tasks.emptyHint: No task records yet. Start a separation task to monitor progress and execution logs here.
tasks.clearHistoryConfirm: Completed, failed, and cancelled task records will be removed. Running tasks will not be affected. Continue?
tasks.runningDescription: Shows queued and running separation tasks with stage progress, execution logs, and available operations.
tasks.historyDescription: Retains completed, failed, and cancelled task records for result review, error details, and logs.

models.title: Model Library
models.subtitle: Browse the model directory, download, and select models for audio separation.
models.search: Search by model name, architecture, or type...
models.empty: No model data. Please load the model list first.
models.searchEmpty: No models match the current filters. Adjust the filters and try again.
models.deleteConfirmContent: Delete the local files for this model? This cannot be undone, but you can download it again later.

results.title: Separation Results
results.subtitle: View audio files and output directories generated by completed tasks.
results.searchPlaceholder: Search by song name, model, stem, or output path
results.noMatchHint: Adjust the search keyword or clear filters.
results.emptyHint: Completed separation outputs will appear here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage appearance, language, runtime environment, and default paths.
settings.runtimeDesc: Check Python, pymss, torch, and available acceleration backends.
settings.envCheckHint: Run environment diagnostics before first use.
